legacyTables.backfillPolicy: convert legacy deposit receipts to DepositLedger received/confirmed transaction entries during explicit backfill only
derive liability from DepositLedger transaction history; do not double-count legacy liability rows
convert only non-deposit ordinary payment rows; deposit purpose rows migrate to DepositLedger
attach to converted PaymentLedger payment ids by original payment_id
freeze as audit history unless explicitly mapped to a ledger confirmation event

guards: CheckIn persistence must not write new ledger fact tables
PeriodAnalytics and risk lenses must not sum legacy and new ledger facts together
Backfill must be dry-run first and must be idempotent
